items.name_cn:
Top-tier replica, complete packaging
DIO.R Oblique Backpack#
This is a DIO.R Oblique backpack that can be a couple's style
Based on the Monogram, it also features small metal logos, looking soft and cute. The canvas material is very lightweight, large capacity, light weight, practical and stylish. I'll keep this one for now, anyway my wallet is empty.
The iconic oblique vintage print pattern has been integrated into everyone's trendy attitude. Carrying monogram items makes you look like you're at Paris Fashion Week wherever you go.
Whoever wears it is stylish. Let's get a couple's style✌︎✌︎✌︎
Large size: 30x15x42cm

items.name_cn:
Top-tier replica, high version
【Top-tier Original Batch Denim Blue D💙 Large】Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
This Book Tote bag is inspired by Creative Director of Women's Wear Maria Grazia Chiuri and is a flagship product reflecting Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily items, featuring a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery, adding more fashion flair. The front is adorned with a "Christian Dior" logo, fully embodying Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Dimensions: 42 x 35 x 18.5 cm (L x H x W)
Spacious interior, fits 1 15-inch laptop, 1 clutch, 1 wallet, 1 phone, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
Top-tier upgraded version
Size 23×13×6cm
Dior Miss Caro Shoulder Bag, large oversized woven pattern in pink lambskin. Many also call it the 'Dumpling Bag'. It is a new arrival from the 2025 Early Spring collection, enriching the Miss Caro series with stylish and refined pieces ✨. Featuring original pink lambskin, decorated with a large woven pattern stitching to enhance the look, paired with decorative matching straps, and a vintage gold-finish metal CD logo on the front. It looks high-class and elegant when carried casually.
Great for photos and styling!

items.name_cn:
Top-tier Upgraded Version
Size: 21 x 11.5 x 4.5cm
Lady Dior Woc Handle Pearl Chain Bag, Spring/Summer New Arrival, crafted from calfskin, featuring the Dior Oblique pattern. The flap design with a D.I.O.R. charm elevates the style. Practical with multiple compartments and card slots for daily essentials, it is an ideal companion for both day and evening wear. Equipped with a top handle and a detachable chain adorned with resin beads, it can be carried by hand or worn crossbody.

🖤Super mini Diana Bag 3-compartment🖤
Dior Lady Micro Bag
So cute and tiny! The super mini black and gold combination is simple, elegant, and imposing. The bag embodies Dior's profound insight into refinement and beauty. Crafted from calfskin, it features guilloche quilting and a signature silhouette accented with charms. The mini size holds various small essentials, making it the perfect companion for evening looks.
Model: 0856
Dimensions: 12*10*5cm.

items.name_en: Toujours Vertical Medium, the exclusive 'market bag', is simply beautiful. A high-appeal bag that effortlessly exudes sophistication. Featuring an oversized quilted design paired with classic lettering accessories, it offers a modern and stylish look. The bag structure is very soft, and the calfskin material feels premium. The unique buckle fastening allows the sides to fold when closed. It comes with a long shoulder strap, scoring full marks for practicality and capacity, easily holding all daily essentials.

items.name_en: True factory goods, ZP-level genuine quality, we ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic raw materials.
items.name_cn:
True factory goods, ZP-level genuine quality, we ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic raw materials.
Mini BOOK TOTE Handbag (with shoulder strap)
Exclusive channel goods, the most cost-effective blue D mini shoulder strap version
Blue and beige Oblique print embroidery
Number: S5573CRIW_M928
Size Information
Size: 21.5x13x7.5 cm (LxHxW)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, and lipstick
Shoulder strap length: 68-124 cm
Top of strap to top of bag: 31-60 cm
Weight: approx. 289g
This mini size handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Early Spring collection, carefully designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri to enrich the classic Dior Book Tote series.
Adorned with the brand's classic blue and beige Oblique print embroidery throughout, accented with the Christian Dior Paris logo.
This Dior Book Tote handbag showcases Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, featuring a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap for carrying by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Front features the Christian Dior Paris logo
Detachable, adjustable shoulder strap
Includes box

items.name_en: Upgraded Version, Exclusive High-Quality Replica, Black
items.name_cn:
Upgraded Version, Exclusive High-Quality Replica, Black
Di0r Ultra-matte 🖤 SO BLACK
A dark-themed Diana bag
The hardware chain and handle are all textured matte black.
The all-black color scheme is versatile and elegant.
Perfect for daily commuting paired with a capable work outfit.
At the same time, the bag is not just low-key; it is also very versatile.
Pair it with cargo pants to transform into a dark style.
If you get tired of the all-black look, add a silk scarf to make it more romantic.
The leather is calfskin.
Compared to the sheepskin version, it is less prone to deformation and scratches.
Simply wipe it down after use.
It is a luxury bag that is not high-maintenance.
Size: 17cm
